_comment: Maps each plugin release to config improvements. Used by the preflight agent to surface targeted upgrade actions when a version bump is detected between the installed plugin and the version stored in .preflight-state.json.

1.2.4.summary: Simplified session-logger hook — postToolUse now captures only phase boundaries (report_intent) and shell commands (powershell), reducing invocations by ~80% while preserving the two highest-signal data points for skill extraction. Removed dead log-tool-call helper scripts that referenced a non-existent env-var hook interface.

configImpacts.description: Session-logger postToolUse simplified to capture only report_intent (phase boundaries) and powershell (shell commands). Previously logged every tool call — view, read, grep, glob, edit, ask_user, etc. — producing hundreds of low-signal entries per session. The session store (SQL) serves as the primary source for file edit patterns, co-edit clusters, and cross-session repetition. The sessionEnd skill-review threshold is also lowered from 10 to 5 lines to account for reduced log volume.
configImpacts.recommendation: Reinstall the session-logger hook via @preflight to get the simplified postToolUse. Existing JSONL logs remain readable — the skill-extractor still works with the old format.

1.2.3.summary: Added commit message instructions category — scaffolds a dedicated instruction file for VS Code commit generation, keeping commit conventions out of inline suggestions and chat.

configImpacts.description: Commit message instructions — creates .github/instructions/commit-message.instructions.md with Conventional Commits rules, project-derived scopes, and concrete examples. Wired via .vscode/settings.json (github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGeneration.instructions) so it loads only when generating commit messages — never during inline suggestions or chat.
configImpacts.recommendation: Re-run @preflight and select the new 'Commit message instructions' category (Category 3) to set this up.

1.2.2.summary: Removed broken skill-usage tracking — postToolUse hooks lack skill context, so skill-usage.json was always empty. Eval and cleanup workflows now use session activity pattern matching instead.

configImpacts.description: The 2nd sessionEnd step in session-logger.json (skill-usage.json aggregation) has been removed. The step relied on COPILOT_SKILL_NAME and postToolUse skill context, neither of which exist in the hook runtime — resulting in skill-usage.json always being empty.
configImpacts.recommendation: Reinstall the session-logger hook to remove the defunct skill-usage aggregation step. Existing session logs are unaffected.

configImpacts.description: Skill-extractor evaluation and cleanup workflows now use session activity pattern matching and file pattern validation instead of skill-usage.json metrics — producing accurate results without the broken dependency.
configImpacts.recommendation: No action needed. Re-run @skill-extractor normally — it will use the improved pattern-based approach automatically.

1.2.1.summary: Improved skill extractor — session logger now captures intent and search patterns, extractor uses phase-based detection for higher-quality skill candidates.

configImpacts.description: Session logger hook now captures `intent` from report_intent and `pattern` from grep/glob — enabling phase-based session analysis.
configImpacts.recommendation: Reinstall the session-logger hook to start capturing intent and pattern data. Existing logs still work but lack these fields.

configImpacts.description: Skill extractor now splits sessions into named phases via report_intent entries and detects phase-level workflow patterns (Explore → Plan → Implement → Release).
configImpacts.recommendation: Run @skill-extractor after a few sessions to benefit from improved phase-aware pattern detection.

1.2.0.summary: Added plugin update detection — preflight now checks for newer releases and surfaces config improvements when the plugin has been updated since your last setup.

configImpacts.description: Plugin update detection — preflight now compares the installed version against the latest GitHub release and against the version stored in your project's .preflight-state.json.
configImpacts.recommendation: Re-run @preflight to start tracking pluginVersion in your state file. Future re-runs will detect version drift and surface targeted upgrade suggestions automatically.

1.1.0.summary: Added session learning hooks, config freshness checker, and audit mode with stack-drift detection.

configImpacts.description: Session-logger hook — tracks tool usage per session (<1ms overhead). Enables @skill-extractor to analyze patterns and auto-generate reusable skills after 3-5 sessions.
configImpacts.recommendation: Install if you want @skill-extractor to extract workflow patterns into reusable skills over time.

configImpacts.description: Config-freshness hook — shows a one-line reminder at session start when Copilot config is stale (configurable threshold, default 30 days).
configImpacts.recommendation: Install to ensure your team is reminded to re-run @preflight when the config ages.

configImpacts.description: Audit mode — detects stack drift between current scan and stored .preflight-state.json (e.g., framework changes, new test tools). Surfaces evidence-backed improvement suggestions.
configImpacts.recommendation: Re-run @preflight and choose 'Audit & improve' to surface any stack drift since your last setup.

configImpacts.description: Deep scan offer — analyses naming conventions, import styles, and architectural patterns from linter configs to generate more precise instructions.
configImpacts.recommendation: Re-run @preflight and accept the deep scan offer to improve instruction specificity.

1.0.0.summary: Initial release — repo-wide instructions, path-specific instructions, custom agents, basic state tracking.
